title: PlanReviewOutput
description: Structured output of the adversarial-plan-review skill. Validated by planReviewer.runPlanReview before being surfaced to the user. The six-category gap taxonomy is the differentiator and is hard-coded in prompts/plan-review-system.md.

verdict.description: Overall plan verdict. 'acceptable' = severity < 25, 'needs-revision' = 25 <= severity < 70, 'unfit' = severity >= 70.

severity_score.description: Integer risk score in [0, 100]. Higher = more dangerous to execute the plan as written.

gaps.description: Per-gap findings, one entry per identified gap. Empty array allowed when the plan is acceptable.

out_of_scope_validated.description: Concerns the plan explicitly and correctly declared out-of-scope. Rewards plans that are tight about their boundaries.

next_revision_hints.description: Short, ordered list of actionable strings the author should incorporate into the next revision of the plan.

category.description: The hard-coded gap category. MUST match prompts/plan-review-system.md verbatim.

impact.description: Single-sentence statement of what goes wrong if this gap ships.

mitigation.description: Single-sentence concrete mitigation the author should add to the plan.
